extensionDescription.message: Save images from the web to Artist Reference Collection (ARC).

popupHoverHint.message: Hover an image on a page and click the save button, or use the context menu.

statusDisabled.message: Import API is disabled in ARC settings

statusQueued.message: Queued — will send when ARC is available

offlineToastBody.message: The image was added to the extension queue (up to 50). When you open ARC with Import API enabled, the queue will be sent automatically.

popupOfflineExplain.message: ARC is not available on localhost:47896. You can still save images — they go into a local queue in the extension and are sent when ARC starts.

disabledToastBody.message: Enable Import API in ARC Settings → Browser extension.
